programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Although they made their way through high school successfully, an investigation at a local college brings big changes for undercover officers Jenko and Schmidt. When Jenko meets a kindred spirit on the football team and Schmidt infiltrates the bohemian art-major scene, both men begin to question their partnership. Not only do they have to crack the case, but now the two overgrown adolescents must learn how to behave like adults.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: When cops Schmidt (Jonah Hill) and Jenko (Channing Tatum) join the secret Jump Street unit, they use their youthful appearances to go under cover as high-school students. They trade in their guns and badges for backpacks, and set out to shut down a dangerous drug ring. But, as time goes on, Schmidt and Jenko discover that high school is nothing like it was just a few years earlier -- and, what's more, they must again confront the teenage terror and anxiety they thought they had left behind.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Although they made their way through high school successfully, an investigation at a local college brings big changes for undercover officers Jenko and Schmidt. When Jenko meets a kindred spirit on the football team and Schmidt infiltrates the bohemian art-major scene, both men begin to question their partnership. Not only do they have to crack the case, but now the two overgrown adolescents must learn how to behave like adults.

programme.title: Half Brothers
programme.desc: Renato, a successful Mexican aviation executive, is shocked to discover he has an American half brother he never knew about -- the free-spirited Asher. The two very different half brothers are forced on a road trip together. masterminded by their ailing father, tracing the path he took as an immigrant from Mexico to America.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A lady suffering from pain and numbness duct tapes her calf implants daily to smooth the deformity; a young woman has a beast of a birthmark that hurts her neck.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A cancer survivor loses her upper lip after a procedure; a college scholar hopes to remove a gruesome graft from her foot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A woman's nose is making her crazy, and she hopes Dr. Nassif can give her the Tiffany Pollard profile she's always wanted; a singer obsessed with the 2000s and Britney Spears seeks bigger breasts; Dr. Dubrow helps a young mom fix her knee.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A nudist who swings on and off the golf course seeks the doctors' advice for her overly liposuctioned stomach; a mother left with dilapidated boobs faces her fears of anesthesia; an African woman hopes to achieve her American Dream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: An investigation uncovers troubling allegations about the long running hit daytime series "The Dr. Phil Show" while former show guests reveal shocking behind-scenes experiences of coercion and humiliation.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: The investigation continues, as suspicious relationships emerge between The Dr. Phil Show and its preferred treatment facilities; one family's trust in televised help leads to years of suffering.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: In 2003, supermodel Tyra Banks broke into the world of reality TV; ANTM offered women from all over the country the promise of fame and fortune, but the aspiring models soon realize they may be collateral damage on the show's path to popularity.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: As ANTM becomes more popular, it pulls in more seemingly vulnerable girls; some hopeful contestants claim they were treated increasingly poorly, leading to allegations of lasting trauma from what they endured on the show.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: America loved Bob Barker, but few knew about the scandal behind the scenes at The Price is Right; former employees break decades of silence, exposing a hidden affair and secrets that reveal a darker side of television's most beloved game show icon.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: Bob Barker retaliates against model Holly Hallstrom after she refuses to testify on his behalf, triggering a decade-long legal war; as mass firings and new allegations surface, Barker's power is exposed and the women who stood up are finally heard.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie and Chelsea get together for one night, despite having ended their relationship; Charlie struggles to accept it as a one time thing.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie has a return engagement with Gail (Tricia Helfer), Chelsea's best friend; Alan has a surprising effect on a female patient.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kim invites Scott to a family trip to New York to show Kourtney how far he has come as a family man; Kim also contemplates an unexpected move to Chicago; Kris fears her mother might be seriously ill.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Pt. 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloé's ex; Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week; tension boils over when Kim and Khloé confront Kourtney over her recent attitude.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week, Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids; realizing that her lifestyle is making her unhappy, Kourtney considers making a major change; Kylie is too sick to fulfill her work obligations in Paris.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, a naive but lovable dog named Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier and his gang of strays. Determined to seek revenge, Reggie and his new canine pals embark on an epic adventure to get him home and make Doug pay for his dirty deed.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: Searching for a safer habitat, the prehistoric Crood family discovers an idyllic, walled-in paradise that meets all of its needs. Unfortunately, they must also learn to live with the Bettermans -- a family that's a couple of steps above the Croods on the evolutionary ladder. As tensions between the new neighbors start to rise, a new threat soon propels both clans on an epic adventure that forces them to embrace their differences, draw strength from one another, and survive together.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
